title: Verify the display of bus routes
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Verify that all bus routes (Route 20, Route 22, Route 26, etc.) are displayed in the list. | Check if the route map for Route 22 is partially visible.
expected_result: All bus routes are displayed correctly. | The route map for Route 22 is partially visible.

title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Tap the back arrow in the header to navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app navigates back to the previous screen successfully.

title: Select a bus route
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Tap on a bus route (e.g., Route 20) in the list.
expected_result: The app navigates to the detailed information screen for the selected bus route.

title: Check for missing bus routes
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Verify that all expected bus routes (Route 20, Route 22, Route 26, etc.) are present.
expected_result: All expected bus routes are present.

title: Check for duplicate bus routes
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Verify that there are no duplicate bus routes in the list.
expected_result: There are no duplicate bus routes in the list.

title: Check for empty list
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Verify that the list is not empty.

title: Check for route map visibility
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Verify that the route map for Route 22 is partially visible.
expected_result: The route map for Route 22 is partially visible.

title: Check for advertisement banner
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Bus Routes' screen. | Verify that the advertisement banner is partially visible at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The advertisement banner is partially visible at the bottom of the screen.
